auth.loginHelp: Need first-time access? Ask an administrator for your activation link.
auth.activationSubtitle: Set your password to activate member #{memberNumber}.
auth.activationErrorSubtitle: This activation link cannot be used anymore.
auth.activationIntro: Welcome, {name}. Set your password now to finish your member activation.
auth.activationInvalidBody: This activation link is invalid. Ask an administrator for a new one.
auth.activationExpiredBody: This activation link expired after 24 hours. Ask an administrator for a new one.
auth.activationUsedBody: This activation link has already been used. Sign in normally or ask an administrator for help.
auth.recoverySubtitle: Set your new password for member #{memberNumber}.
auth.recoveryErrorSubtitle: This recovery link cannot be used anymore.
auth.recoveryIntro: Hello, {name}. Set your new password to recover access.
auth.recoveryInvalidBody: This recovery link is invalid. Contact an administrator.
auth.recoveryExpiredBody: This recovery link expired after 24 hours. Contact an administrator.
auth.recoveryUsedBody: This recovery link has already been used. Contact an administrator if you still cannot access the account.
auth.registerUnavailableBody: We have paused self-service registration while the authentication cutover is being finalized. Please sign in with an existing account or contact the association to request access.

errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.passwordLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
errors.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
errors.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number
errors.passwordAlphanumericOnly: Password must contain only letters and numbers
errors.memberNumberTooLong: Member number must not exceed 10 digits
errors.memberNumberNumeric: Member number must contain only digits

rooms.title: Game Rooms
rooms.subtitle: Explore our rooms and book your table
rooms.noTables: This room has no tables yet

tables.surfaceConflict: This table already has the other surface reserved at this time
tables.selectSurface: Which surface do you want to reserve?

reservations.title: My Reservations
reservations.subtitle: Manage your table reservations
reservations.selectTimeForEquipment: Select a time range to load available equipment.
reservations.equipmentUnavailableReason: Already reserved in an overlapping booking. Choose another item or another time range.
reservations.equipmentNoneConfigured: This room has no equipment configured.
reservations.equipmentNoneAvailable: No equipment is available for the selected time range.
reservations.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this reservation?

errors.conflictTime: A reservation already exists at that time
errors.pastDate: You cannot book dates in the past
errors.invalidTime: End time must be after start time
errors.userSlotConflict: You already have a reservation in this time slot
errors.eventBlocked: This time slot is blocked by an event.
errors.equipmentConflict: Selected equipment is no longer available for that time range.
errors.bookingWindow: Reservations can only be created up to one week in advance.
errors.cancellationCutoff: This reservation cannot be cancelled — it starts in less than 60 minutes.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

admin.userManagementDescription: Review, edit, and unblock accounts. Bulk import now opens in a modal from this section.
admin.deleteUserConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This action cannot be undone.
admin.importMembersDescription: Upload a member file and review the result before closing the modal.
admin.importMembersDropLabel: Drag the file or click to select it.
admin.importMembersFailed: The import could not be completed.
admin.importMembersCreated: {count, plural, one {# member created} other {# members created}}
admin.importMembersUpdated: {count, plural, one {# member updated} other {# members updated}}
admin.importMembersSkipped: {count, plural, one {# row skipped} other {# rows skipped}}
admin.cancelReservationConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this reservation?
admin.activationLinkFailed: Could not generate the activation link.
admin.activationLinkPrompt: Copy and share this activation link:
admin.recoveryLinkFailed: Could not generate the recovery link.
admin.recoveryLinkPrompt: Copy and share this recovery link:
admin.deleteEventConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the event "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.

events.title: Events
events.allDayHelp: Reserve selected room for the full day without setting start and end times.
events.conflictWarning: This event cannot be deleted because active or pending reservations exist for the affected room during this time.
events.deleteError: An error occurred while deleting the event. Please try again.
events.deleteWarning: Deleting this event will also cancel any active or pending member reservations for this room during the event time.

equipment.title: Equipment
equipment.deleteEquipmentConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

home.heroSubtitle: Alea Cultural Association — the reference space for tabletop RPGs, board games, and play culture in our city.
home.featuresSubtitle: This platform is your control center to manage tables, reservations, and more.
home.feature1Desc: Check real-time availability across all 6 rooms and reserve your table for any gaming session.
home.feature2Desc: Every table has its own QR code. Scan it to activate your booking or check status at any time.
home.feature3Desc: Access your reservation history, cancel when you can't attend, and organize your gaming sessions easily.
home.feature4Desc: From small tables for intimate games to removable-top tables for wargames and 3D dungeon maps.
home.ctaSubtitle: Create your account with your member number and start booking.

checkin.title: Check-in
checkin.activated: You're checked in! Your reservation is now active.
checkin.tooEarly: It's too early. Your session hasn't started yet.
checkin.tooLate: The check-in window has closed. Your reservation has expired.
checkin.noReservation: No reservation found for this table.
checkin.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.madeWithLove: Made with love for the gaming community
